title: Command Search Cockpit
concept: A dense power-user Playground shell where command search and grouped command results are the discovery layer, while persistent execution panels show route-specific inputs, warnings, progress, final state mutations, and transfer history beside a protected live WordPress preview.
focus: grouped readable command results with keyboard hints
ZIP and GitHub export transfer lifecycle
flows: Import a ZIP archive end to end with source selection, validation failure option, replacement warning, import progress, success state, active shell title update, storage badge mutation, path update, saved-object row mutation, preview change, and transfer-history record
Download the active Playground as a ZIP with source status, generation progress, generated filename, database inclusion, and transfer-history result
Export the active Playground to GitHub with account connection, session-only token consequence, repository destination, progress, completed branch result, and transfer-history record

Save the active temporary Playground in browser storage or to a local directory with distinct destination consequences, file-copy progress, storage identity mutation, saved row update, and reset versus Save & Reload behavior
Use command search to launch Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, and ZIP import routes with route-specific inputs and replacement consequences
Use Site Manager Settings, Files, Blueprint, Database, Logs, Export to GitHub, Download as zip, database download, and Blueprint bundle actions while the live WordPress shell remains visible
featureCoverage: Vanilla WordPress start
WordPress PR preview
Gutenberg PR or branch preview
GitHub import with account connection and non-persistent token warning
Blueprint URL runner
Import .zip with native chooser framing, selected archive, validation failure, replacement warning, progress, and imported identity
Blueprint gallery categories and search with an honest representative subset of 43 entries
Featured Blueprint shortcuts including Art Gallery, Coffee Shop, Feed Reader with the Friends Plugin, Gaming News, Non-profit Organization, and Personal Blog
Save temporary Playground in browser storage
Save to a local directory with folder permission, denial/cancel result, and reconnect consequence
Visible save progress with file-copy framing
Saved, unsaved, local-directory, and imported Playground object list
Open, manage, rename, delete confirmation, cancel, row removal, and active fallback behavior
Current shell path input and refresh
Homepage and WP Admin shortcuts
Temporary, saved, local, and imported storage badges
WordPress version, PHP version, language, older versions, network access, and multisite settings
Destructive temporary reset and stored Save & Reload consequences
File browser with create file, create folder, upload, browse files, selected editor, dirty marker, save, and result state
Blueprint editor with Blueprint URL, validation, copy link, download bundle, run, replacement result, and gallery subset
SQLite-backed database driver, path, size, database download, Adminer, and phpMyAdmin
Playground, WordPress, and PHP logs with warning and empty states
Export to GitHub with connection, repository, progress, and success
Download active Playground as .zip with generated result
Database download
Blueprint bundle copy/download/run actions
Transfer history for saves, imports, exports, downloads, file edits, settings, Blueprint runs, rename, delete, and path navigation
